response.justification: While the candidate possesses extensive software development experience across various technologies and demonstrates strong agile and distributed systems expertise, they critically lack the recent, in-depth C++ experience required for a 'Senior Manager - Digital Solutions (C++ Developer)' role. Furthermore, there is no mention of the essential industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices that are central to this position.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and agile methodologies.
Demonstrated abilities in mentoring, communication, and knowledge-sharing through workshops and talks.
concerns: Very limited and outdated professional C++ experience (6 months, almost a decade ago) for a C++ developer role.
Complete absence of industrial cybersecurity knowledge, including IEC 62443 standards and SDL implementation.
Minimal experience in industrial automation and specific protocols relevant to the industry.
